loading.description: Loading spinner message while the scan API processes the image

cameraTab.description: Mode toggle tab label for camera scanning

searchTab.description: Mode toggle tab label for text search

cameraModeLabel.description: Accessibility label for the camera mode toggle button

searchModeLabel.description: Accessibility label for the text search mode toggle button

searchPlaceholder.description: Placeholder text for the book title/author search input. 'John Adams' and 'McCullough' are proper names — keep them.
searchPlaceholder.notes: Proper nouns must not be translated

searchInputA11y.description: Accessibility label for the search text input

searchButtonA11y.description: Accessibility label for the search submit button

searchButton.description: Label on the search submit button

permissionText.description: Explanatory text shown when camera permission is not granted

allowCamera.description: Button label to request camera permission

allowCameraA11y.description: Accessibility label for the allow camera button

captureA11y.description: Accessibility label for the camera shutter button

captureHint.description: Accessibility hint explaining what the capture button does

noBooksFoundTitle.description: Alert title when scan returns no book matches

noBooksFoundMessage.description: Alert message prompting user to try again after empty scan result

scanFailedTitle.description: Alert title when the scan API call fails

scanFailedMessage.description: Alert message for a scan API failure

noResultsTitle.description: Alert title when text search returns no results

noResultsMessage.description: Alert message prompting user to try a different search query

searchFailedTitle.description: Alert title when the search API call fails

searchFailedMessage.description: Alert message for a search API failure

addedTitle.description: Alert title confirming a book was added to the wishlist

addedMessage.description: Alert message confirming which book was added. {{title}} is the book title.

couldNotSaveTitle.description: Alert title when saving to wishlist fails

couldNotSaveMessage.description: Alert message for a wishlist save failure

flipCamera.description: Short label on the button that flips between front and back camera

flipCameraA11y.description: Accessibility label for the flip camera button
